steps.t: Lizbeth Honeymeade is the proprietor of The Comb and Wattle Inn in Combe, south of Archet. Jon Brackenbrook said you were to meet the grim stranger in…
Toradan's room is at the end of the hall at the top of the stairs across the common room. You have come to The Comb and Wattle Inn, as instructed, and…
